title: Sisigium
description: A lightweight optimization and visuals modpack designed for compatibility in the Itlogus Minecraft Server!
body:
Optimization and visuals modpack designed for recommended for compatibility in the Itlogus Minecraft Server!

## What is Sisigium?

Sisigium is an optimization and visuals modpack designed for any vanilla server with emotes and voice chat!

## What is Sisig?

The word "sisig" is derived from a popular Filipino dish! It's a sizzling platter of pork jowl and ears (maskara), pork belly, and chicken liver, all seasoned with calamansi, onions, and chili peppers. It's a real treat and a must-try when you're in the Philippines.

This modpack provides the following:

1. Parity with Optifine!
2. Optimal Performance!
3. Talk to others with SimpleVoiceChat!*
4. Expressions with Emotecraft!*
5. Realistic Sounds!

* Server must install these mods to make it work!
